testcase.name: robots.ts — production behavior > VERCEL_ENV=undefined (fail-safe default) never emits a global Disallow: /
robots.ts — production behavior > VERCEL_ENV=empty string never emits a global Disallow: /
robots.ts — production behavior > includes sitemap URL pointing to /sitemap.xml
robots.ts — production behavior > allows / for the wildcard (*) user-agent
robots.ts — production behavior > explicitly allows AI crawler "GPTBot" in production
robots.ts — production behavior > explicitly allows AI crawler "ChatGPT-User" in production
robots.ts — production behavior > explicitly allows AI crawler "Claude-Web" in production
robots.ts — production behavior > explicitly allows AI crawler "PerplexityBot" in production
robots.ts — production behavior > explicitly allows AI crawler "Google-Extended" in production
robots.ts — production behavior > AI crawler rules allow / and do not globally block all paths
robots.ts — preview/staging behavior > VERCEL_ENV=preview blocks all crawlers with Disallow: /
robots.ts — preview/staging behavior > VERCEL_ENV=development blocks all crawlers with Disallow: /
robots.ts — preview/staging behavior > VERCEL_ENV=preview emits no sitemap
sitemap > returns marketing, blog, profile, release, and deduplicated track URLs
sitemap > returns a non-empty sitemap where every entry has lastModified
SEO ratchet baseline > baseline file is valid and non-empty
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(home)/page.tsx > source file exists
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(home)/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: metadata-export
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(home)/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: description
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(home)/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: openGraph
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(home)/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: twitter
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(home)/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: canonical
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(home)/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: json-ld
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/pricing/page.tsx > source file exists
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/pricing/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: metadata-export
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/pricing/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: description
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/pricing/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: openGraph
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/pricing/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: twitter
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/about/page.tsx > source file exists
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/about/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: metadata-export
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/about/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: description
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/about/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: openGraph
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/about/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: canonical
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/blog/page.tsx > source file exists
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/blog/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: metadata-export
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/blog/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: description
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/blog/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: canonical
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/blog/[slug]/page.tsx > source file exists
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/blog/[slug]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: metadata-export
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/blog/[slug]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: description
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/blog/[slug]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: openGraph
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/blog/[slug]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: twitter
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/blog/[slug]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: canonical
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/support/page.tsx > source file exists
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/support/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: metadata-export
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/support/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: description
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/support/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: canonical
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/changelog/page.tsx > source file exists
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/changelog/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: metadata-export
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/changelog/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: description
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/(marketing)/changelog/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: canonical
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/page.tsx > source file exists
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: metadata-export
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: description
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: openGraph
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: twitter
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: canonical
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: json-ld
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/[slug]/page.tsx > source file exists
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/[slug]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: metadata-export
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/[slug]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: description
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/[slug]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: openGraph
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/[slug]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: twitter
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/[slug]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: canonical
SEO ratchet baseline > route: app/[username]/[slug]/page.tsx > has required SEO signal: json-ld
validateRobotsTxt > passes production-shaped robots with sitemap and AI crawlers
validateRobotsTxt > fails when User-agent: * globally blocks all paths
validateRobotsTxt > fails when sitemap reference is missing
validateRobotsTxt > fails when a required AI crawler rule is missing
validateSitemapXml > passes non-empty sitemap entries with lastmod
validateSitemapXml > fails on empty body
validateSitemapXml > fails when url entries are missing lastmod
validateSitemapXml > fails when sitemap has no url entries
